meaning: n.[动]印度豹(一种似豹的动物,产于南亚及非洲)
examples: How fast can a cheetah run?
The cheetah can attain speeds of up to 97 kph.
The cheetah is generally credited as the world's fastest animal.
Among the 40 choices are a Bengal tiger, lion, panther, cheetah or leopard cub.
The cheetah is perfectly honed to hunt gazelles but the gazelle is equally well equipped to escape cheetahs.
